title: Speed Building - Scaffolding behavior
description: Quickly mass place rails and ladders just like Scaffolding
body:
You can build multiple ladders and rails away from you in the expected direction.

Implemented in a similar fashion to scaffolds


CONFIG:

scaffoldingpower.toml 


![Just hold the button to build a railway](https://i.imgur.com/bHiTnYd.gif)

![Ladders](https://i.imgur.com/Q7g8WUk.gif)

![redstone](https://i.imgur.com/EItAvL8.gif)
